description: Queen Patch 12 / Season 9 Balance Patch (19 May 2020) — Mobile Improvements, Mail UI, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Axes, Crossbows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Hammers, Holy Staffs, Maces, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Spears, Swords, Armors, Mounts), Fixes.

sections.heading: Mobile Improvements and Fixes
items: Virtual joystick now scales its touch area size based on UI scaling
Moved mount button to the right of the joystick and decreased its size
Enabled "Double press to attack" in joystick control settings
Added option to ignore low-tier resources while gathering using the action button
Added option to disable "Double-Tap Opens Zoom Mode"
Added on-press tooltips to buff/debuff effects
Adjusted Destiny tracker in HUD to show more entries depending on screen space
Added conditional keyboard shortcut displays for bottom layout spells when mouse present
Tap-control bottom layout now more closely resembles desktop layout
Improved carry capacity indicator readability
Fixed an issue where Marketplace category submenus were offscreen at 100% scaling
Fixed an issue where spell buttons could appear slightly rotated when switching vanity/combat spells and moving spell bar
Fixed an issue where mount button appearance was not updated when pressed
sections.searchable_text: Mobile Improvements joystick touch area scaling mount button double press attack ignore low-tier resources zoom mode tooltips buff debuff Destiny tracker keyboard shortcuts tap-control carry capacity Marketplace spell buttons vanity combat

sections.heading: Mail UI Improvements
items: Updated timers: expiration timer in read view, received timer in inbox
Bought/sold items now appear in bold
Increased font size in read view
Item icons now clickable in messages
Improved alignment and readability of messages
sections.searchable_text: Mail UI Improvements timers expiration inbox bold font size item icons clickable alignment readability

sections.heading: Other Changes
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes damage allies knockdown lethal Crystal Realm Orb claim time 10s 7.5s

subsections.heading: Other Changes
subsections.searchable_text: damage yourself allies lethal knockdown Crystal Realm Orb claim time 10s 7.5s

changes.raw_text: Damage from yourself or allies is no longer lethal, and now results only in knockdown
notes: Damage from yourself or allies is no longer lethal — now results only in knockdown

changes.raw_text: Crystal Realm Orb claim time: 10s → 7.5s

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Axes Crossbows Cursed Staffs Daggers Fire Staffs Hammers Holy Staffs Maces Nature Staffs Quarterstaffs Spears Swords Armors Mounts

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Magic Shock new Q-ability 3m radius 150 damage silenced 0.85s Cooldown 5s Cast Time 0.5s Motivating Cleanse ground 5 allies Range 9m 11m Energy Cost 10% Move Speed 20% 40% Duration 5s 3s stunned

changes.ability: Magic Shock (new Q-ability, all Arcane Staffs):
changes.raw_text: Added New Q-Ability: Magic Shock (all Arcane Staffs): 3m radius ground target area. Enemies hit receive 150 Magic Damage and are silenced for 0.85s. Cooldown: 5s. Cast Time: 0.5s.
notes: New Q-Ability: 3m radius ground target area
Enemies hit receive 150 Magic Damage and are silenced for 0.85s

changes.raw_text: Motivating Cleanse: Can now be cast on the ground. Move Speed increase applied to up to 5 allies in range. Can be cast when stunned. Range: 9m → 11m. Energy Cost: 10 Energy → 10% of Max Energy. Move Speed Increase: 20% → 40%. Move Speed Increase Duration: 5s → 3s.
notes: Can now be cast on the ground
Move Speed increase is now applied to up to 5 allies in range

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Rending Strike Energy Cost 2 1.6 Raging Blades Energy Cost 15 11 Morgana Raven Carrioncaller Projectile Range 15m 20m Speed 13.68 20.00 Hit Delay 0.2 0.3 Standtime 1s 0.6s Healing Reduction 35% 40%

changes.raw_text: Rending Strike (all Axes): Energy Cost: 2 → 1.6
Raging Blades (all Axes): Energy Cost: 15 → 11
Morgana Raven (Carrioncaller): Projectile Range: 15m → 20m; Projectile Speed: 13.68m/s → 20.00m/s; Hit Delay: 0.2 → 0.3; Standtime: 1s → 0.6s; Healing Reduction: 35% → 40%

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Sunder Shot Armor Reduction per Stack 0.03 0.027

changes.raw_text: Sunder Shot (all Crossbows): Armor Reduction per Stack: 0.03 → 0.027

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Armor Piercer Hit Delay 0.4s 0.2s Standtime 1s 0.7s Damage 77.11 130.00 Armor reduction 0.15 0.20 Debuff Duration 8s 5s

changes.raw_text: Armor Piercer (all Cursed Staffs): Hit Delay: 0.4s → 0.2s; Standtime: 1s → 0.7s; Damage: 77.11 → 130.00; Armor reduction: 0.15 → 0.20; Debuff Duration: 8s → 5s

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Deadly Swipe Standtime 0.2s 0.1s Chain Slash Max Range 8m 6m invulnerable dashing Damage 106 150 Cooldown 12s 15s

changes.raw_text: Deadly Swipe (all Daggers): Standtime: 0.2s → 0.1s
Chain Slash (all Daggers): Max Range for jumping to next target: 8m → 6m; Caster now invulnerable while dashing between targets; Damage: 106 → 150; Cooldown: 12s → 15s
notes: Caster is now invulnerable while dashing between targets

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Fire Bolt Cast Time 1s 0.7s Impact Damage 87.52 70.00 DoT Damage 5.72 5.50 Energy Cost 4 3 Ignite Hit Delay 0.3s 0s Standtime 0.4s 0.2s Instant Damage 96.23 140.00 DoT removed 20% Health Move Speed Cast Speed 40% 3s

changes.raw_text: Fire Bolt (all Fire Staffs): Cast Time: 1s → 0.7s; Impact Damage: 87.52 → 70.00; DoT Damage: 5.72 → 5.50; Energy Cost: 4 → 3

Ignite (all Fire Staffs): Hit Delay: 0.3s → 0s; Standtime: 0.4s → 0.2s; Instant Damage: 96.23 → 140.00; Removed Damage Over Time effect — instead, hitting a target below 20% Health now gives the caster a 40% Move- and Cast Speed buff for 3 seconds
notes: Instead, hitting a target below 20% Health now gives the caster a 40% Move- and Cast Speed buff for 3 seconds

changes.raw_text: Power Geyser (all Hammers): Cooldown: 10s → 9s; Hit Delay: 0.5s → 0.45s; Standtime: 0.8s → 0.6s
Earth Shatter (One-handed Hammer): Standtime: 1.2s → 0.8s
Groundbreaker (Polehammer): Hit Delay: 0.5s → 0.3s; Standtime: 1s → 0.6s

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Holy Blessing Physical Armor Increase 0.85 0.40 Duration 5s 4s

changes.raw_text: Holy Blessing (all Holy Staffs): Physical Armor Increase: 0.85 → 0.40; Duration: 5s → 4s

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Threatening Smash Hit Delay 0.5s 0.4s Standtime 0.6s 0.5s Area Range 5m 6m Deep Leap One-handed Mace damage distance Stun Area 2m 3m

changes.raw_text: Threatening Smash (all Maces): Hit Delay: 0.5s → 0.4s; Standtime: 0.6s → 0.5s; Area Range: 5m → 6m
Deep Leap (One-handed Mace): Reworked the effect; damage no longer scales based on distance. Stun Area: 2m → 3m
notes: Reworked the effect — damage no longer scales based on distance

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Cleanse Heal ground 5 allies Heal over Time stunned

changes.raw_text: Cleanse Heal (all Nature Staffs): Can now be cast at the ground. The Heal over Time and Cleanse is applied to up to 5 allies in range. Can be still cast when stunned.
notes: Can now be cast at the ground
The Heal over Time and Cleanse is applied to up to 5 allies in range
Can still be cast when stunned

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Separator Knockback Range 7m 6m Slow Duration 5s 3s Root Duration 3.83s 3.00s

changes.raw_text: Separator (Quarterstaff): Knockback Range: 7m → 6m; Slow Duration: 5s → 3s; Root Duration: 3.83s → 3.00s

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Lunging Strike hitbox 1m Fling Glaive Hit Delay 0.4s 0.2s Standtime 1s 0.85s Range 3m 5m Spirit Spear stacks Spectral Trident Trinity Spear buff targets 5 10

changes.raw_text: Lunging Strike (all Spears): Hitbox range extended by 1m
Fling (Glaive): Hit Delay: 0.4s → 0.2s; Standtime: 1s → 0.85s; Range: 3m → 5m; No longer consumes Spirit Spear stacks
notes: No longer consumes Spirit Spear stacks

changes.raw_text: Spectral Trident (Trinity Spear): Maximum buff targets: 5 → 10
Parry Strike (all Swords): Cooldown: 15s → 18s

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Ice Block Cleric Cowl incoming Healing 50% Purifying Smoke Helmet of Valor Hit Delay 1s 0.7s Standtime 0.4s 0s Premonition Boots of Valor cleanse immunity stun root slow 4s

changes.raw_text: Ice Block (Cleric Cowl): While enclosed in Ice Block, incoming Healing reduced by 50%
notes: While enclosed in Ice Block, incoming Healing reduced by 50%

changes.raw_text: Purifying Smoke (Helmet of Valor): Hit Delay: 1s → 0.7s; Standtime: 0.4s → 0s
Premonition (Boots of Valor): Triggering the cleanse now also grants 4s immunity to stun, root and slow
notes: Triggering the cleanse now also grants 4s immunity to stun, root, and slow

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Command Mammoth Base Move Speed 10% 0% Colossus Beetle Base Move Speed 10% 0% Tower Chariot Armor Factor 0.8 1.6 Magic Resist Factor 0.8 1.4

changes.raw_text: Command Mammoth: Base Move Speed Bonus: 10% → 0%
Colossus Beetle: Base Move Speed Bonus: 10% → 0%
Tower Chariot: Armor Factor: 0.8 → 1.6; Magic Resist Factor: 0.8 → 1.4

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed an issue where visual effects were missing from enchanted and overcharged weapons
Fixed gaps in terrain in Watchwood Precipice, Whitecliff Peak, and Drownfield Rut (players in these zones when the patch is deployed will be moved to the nearest exit upon re-login)
Visuals now more effectively show spell area for Lifecurse Staff
sections.searchable_text: Fixes visual effects enchanted overcharged weapons terrain Watchwood Precipice Whitecliff Peak Drownfield Rut Lifecurse Staff spell area
